scripts.smoke:cli: mkdir -p artifacts && trawly inspect --lockfile fixtures/package-lock.json --format json --output artifacts/trawly.json --no-risk && trawly scan --lockfile fixtures/package-lock.json --format sarif --output artifacts/trawly.sarif --fail-on none --no-risk && trawly inspect --lockfile fixtures/package-lock.json --format markdown --output artifacts/trawly.md --no-risk
scripts.smoke:npx: mkdir -p artifacts && npm exec --yes --package ./vendor/trawly-0.0.1.tgz -- trawly inspect --lockfile fixtures/package-lock.json --format json --output artifacts/npx-tarball.json --no-risk
scripts.smoke: npm run smoke:cli && npm run smoke:npx && npm run smoke:assert
